/tmp/codeql-scratch-4bc791703d656660/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/mads-director.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/mads-director.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mads-director.dir/src/config.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mads-director.dir/src/attach_client.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mads-director.dir/src/attach_launcher.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mads-director.dir/src/process_manager.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mads-director.dir/src/gui_app.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mads-director.dir/src/platform_process_posix.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mads-director.dir/src/platform_process_windows.cpp.o" -o mads-director  libimgui.a _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm -ldl
